welcome:
👋 *Hi! Welcome to Klasyk Media Hub!*

I help our school newsroom collect content, register participants, and plan shoots.

Choose a section from the menu below 👇
cancel: ❌ Action cancelled. Returning to main menu.
access_denied:
⛔ Please register first.

Tap «🎥 Join the team!» and fill out the form.
access_pending:
⏳ *Your application is under review*

The administrator has not yet confirmed your registration. Once your account is activated, you will be notified and get access to all sections.
access_deactivated:
🚫 *Your account has been deactivated*

Your access to the bot has been restricted by the administrator. If this is an error, please contact the administrator.
admin_profile_text:
👤 *Your profile*

You are an administrator. Everything works 👍
error_generic: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again later.
reg_welcome:
🎥 *Welcome to the Klasyk TV team!*

Let's fill out a quick form — it'll take 1-2 minutes.

📝 *Step 1/4* — Enter your *full name*:
reg_name_short: ⚠️ Please enter your full name (first and last name):
reg_class_ok:
👍 Class: *{cls}*

📝 *Step 3/4* — Choose your *specialization(s)*.
You can pick several! Tap ✅ Done when finished.
If yours isn't listed — tap ✍️ Other.
reg_spec_other_added:
✅ Added: *{spec}*
You can pick more or tap ✅ Done.
reg_spec_ok:
👍 Specializations: *{specs}*

📝 *Step 4/4* — What *software* do you know?
_(CapCut, VN, Premiere, Photoshop, Canva etc. — write freely)_
reg_confirm_summary:
📋 *Review your form:*

👤 Name: *{full_name}*
🏫 Class: *{class_name}*
🎯 Specialization: *{specs}*
💻 Software: *{software}*

Everything correct?
reg_success:
🎉 *Congratulations, {name}!*

You're now registered with the *Klasyk TV* team!

We'll contact you soon. Stay tuned for updates 🚀
con_start:
📥 *Submit content*

Great! Let's upload the material.

📌 *Step 1/4* — Choose *content type*:
con_type_text:
✅ Type: *{ctype}*

📌 *Step 2/4* — Write your news text or idea.
_You can write multiple paragraphs!_
con_type_file:
✅ Type: *{ctype}*

📌 *Step 2/4* — Upload a file.

📎 *Send as document* (paperclip) — no quality loss
or as a regular message — faster, but compressed
con_file_invalid: ⚠️ Send a photo, video, document, or text.
con_step3:
✅ {label}

📌 *Step 3/4* — Write a *description*:
What's happening? Who's in the frame? What event?
_The more detail — the better!_
con_desc_short: ⚠️ Please describe in more detail — at least a few words.
sched_empty: 📅 No planned events yet. Check back later!
sched_admin_no_signup: You're an admin — manage, don't sign up 🙂
sched_signup_confirm:
✅ *Done!* You're signed up for:
*{title}*
📆 {date}  📍 {location}

We'll remind you closer to the date 🔔
kb_title:
📚 *Klasyk TV Knowledge Base*

Choose a section:
profile_not_found:
👤 *Profile not found*

You haven't registered yet.
Tap *«🎥 Join the team!»* to fill out the form.
profile_edit_instruction:
✏️ To update your info — tap *«🎥 Join the team!»* in the menu.
Your form will be overwritten.
adm_no_access: ⛔ You don't have access to the admin panel.
adm_user_activated_notify:
🎉 *Great news!*

Your application to Klasyk TV has been approved! Welcome ✅
adm_user_deactivated_notify:
ℹ️ Your status in Klasyk TV has been changed to *inactive*.

Contact the administrator if you have questions.
adm_user_deleted_notify:
ℹ️ Unfortunately, your application to Klasyk TV has been rejected.

You can apply again.
adm_events_empty:
📅 No events.

Tap ➕ to create one.
adm_event_add_title:
➕ *Creating a new event*

📝 *Step 1/5* — Enter the event *name*
_(e.g.: 🏆 KVN Finals)_

Cancel: /cancel
adm_event_date_invalid: ⚠️ Wrong format. Enter date as DD.MM.YYYY (e.g.: 25.04.2026):
adm_event_step3:
✅ Date: *{date}*

📝 *Step 3/5* — Enter the *time* (HH:MM)
_(e.g.: 14:30, or «—» if unknown)_
adm_event_step5:
✅ Location: *{location}*

📝 *Step 5/5* — Write a *description / what's needed*
_(e.g.: Need 2 camera operators and a photographer)_
adm_broadcast_title:
📢 *Broadcast*

Recipients: *{count}* users

Write the message text for all participants.
*Markdown* formatting supported.

Cancel: /cancel
adm_broadcast_preview:
📢 *Broadcast preview:*

{text}

─────────────────
Will be sent to *{count}* users.
Confirm?
adm_kb_edit_title:
📝 *Edit knowledge base*

Choose a material to edit:
adm_kb_edit_item:
📝 *Editing material:*

*{title}*

Current text:

{text}

✏️ *Send the new text for this material*:
adm_event_notify_prompt:
📢 *Event created!*

Send a notification to all participants (*{count}* people)?
adm_event_notify_skipped: ℹ️ Notification skipped. The event is already visible in the shooting plan.
